CONFIG_ERROR.description: Configuration file is missing, malformed, or violates the schema in .agent/schema/.
CONFIG_ERROR.fix_template: Run: ai-toolbox validate --json — and apply the fix from each reported error.

CONFIG_MISSING_FIELD.description: A required config field is absent.
CONFIG_MISSING_FIELD.fix_template: Add field $1 to $2 (see .agent/schema/config.schema.json for the required shape).

CONTRACT_VIOLATION.description: A hook produced output that does not conform to .agent/contracts/hook-protocol.json for its client.
CONTRACT_VIOLATION.fix_template: Inspect the hook output for client $1; align with the contract and re-run test-hook-contract.sh.

DETERMINISM_ERROR.description: Two runs of the same command with identical inputs produced different outputs. Indicates an unsorted iteration, time leakage, or side-effect.
DETERMINISM_ERROR.fix_template: Inspect the diff in $1; ensure all list-producing steps pipe through `sort -u` and avoid embedding timestamps.

MIGRATION_ERROR.description: ai-toolbox migrate could not advance the toolbox_version, either because no migration script exists for the version pair or a migration script failed.
MIGRATION_ERROR.fix_template: Check .agent/migrations/ for a script matching $1-to-$2. If absent, file an issue or pin toolbox_version.

MIGRATION_VERSION_MISMATCH.description: The toolbox_version recorded in config does not match the version expected by the bootstrap.

PLUGIN_ERROR.description: Plugin manifest is invalid, missing, or its requires_toolbox_version is incompatible.

PLUGIN_CONFLICT.description: Two plugins contribute conflicting rules and at least one declares conflict_resolution: fail.
PLUGIN_CONFLICT.fix_template: Adjust priority or conflict_resolution in one of the conflicting manifests; or remove one of the plugins.

IO_ERROR.description: A required filesystem operation failed (read, write, or directory creation).

INTERNAL_ERROR.description: An unexpected condition that should never occur. Indicates a bug in the toolbox itself.
INTERNAL_ERROR.fix_template: File an issue at https://github.com/mrAibo/AI_Toolbox/issues with the audit log entry.
